identity.name: MostDomain.com
identity.mission: The premium marketplace for aged, high-authority domains.

gradients.brand_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, hsla(222,47%,11%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 0%, hsla(217,91%,60%,0.1) 0, transparent 50%)

DomainCard.shadow: shadow-lg shadow-slate-200/50 hover:shadow-xl hover:shadow-slate-200/60 transition-all duration-300
DomainCard.typography: Title: text-xl font-bold font-heading; Price: text-2xl font-bold text-primary

Button.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
Button.secondary: bg-secondary text-primary hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium
Button.outline: border-2 border-slate-200 hover:border-primary text-primary hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-full px-6 py-3

Input.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent/20 focus:border-accent h-12 rounded-lg

images.description: Abstract blue/green digital network for hero overlay
Professional team in modern office for About/Trust section
Server rack lights for Features/Security section

instructions_to_main_agent: Install '@radix-ui/react-icons' for additional UI elements if needed.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dialog, Select, Popover).
CUSTOMIZE Shadcn components to match the 'DomainCard' and 'Button' specs defined above. Do not use default Shadcn styling if it conflicts with the rounded-full buttons or specific shadows.
The Hero section must use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy dark blue overlay (90% opacity) to ensure text readability.
For the '/domains' page, create a sidebar layout with Filters on the left and Grid/List view on the right.
Admin Panel: Use the 'dashboard_cols' grid. Sidebar navigation must be dark blue (Primary Color). Content area white/gray.
Ensure all 'data-testid' attributes are added to interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do NOT use Inter font for Headings. Use Outfit.
Do NOT use generic 'center-everything' layouts. Use asymmetric grids.
Add 'hover:scale-[1.02]' or similar micro-interactions to all cards.
